headline: Schwab Crypto Launch Tests Robinhood’s Valuation And Growth Story
summary: Charles Schwab has launched a spot cryptocurrency trading platform for retail clients, entering direct competition with Robinhood Markets (NasdaqGS:HOOD). The new Schwab platform targets the same retail audience that uses Robinhood for crypto trading. This move adds pressure on Robinhood's crypto business at a time when the company has already experienced weakness in crypto related revenue. Robinhood built a large part of its identity around easy access to trading, including crypto, for...
